requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) — Egyptian ES EMC standards and NTRA oversight for refrigerator electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）——埃及ES EMC标准及NTRA对冰箱电子部件的监管
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容（EMC）——埃及ES EMC標準及NTRA對冰箱電子部件的監管

summary.en: Household refrigerators placed on the Egyptian market must meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements derived from the EOS-adopted ES standards equivalent to IEC/CISPR 14 (emission and immunity for household appliances and electric tools). EOS (Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality) issues ES standards that, for refrigerators, generally adopt the IEC text for EMC alongside ES IEC 60335 safety standards. Where the appliance contains a radio module (for example WiFi-enabled smart refrigerators), the National Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (NTRA) type-approval applies in addition to the EMC standard. EMC compliance is demonstrated through testing reports accepted by EOS during conformity assessment; products that fail emission or immunity limits may be rejected at GOEIC import inspection at Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta. The Egyptian grid is 220 V single-phase at 50 Hz, the same frequency as China.
summary.zh: 投放埃及市场的家用电冰箱须满足源自EOS采用的、等效于IEC/CISPR 14（家用电器及电动工具的发射与抗扰度）的ES标准电磁兼容要求。EOS（埃及标准化与质量组织）发布ES标准，对冰箱而言，其EMC通常采用IEC文本，并与ES IEC 60335安全标准并行适用。若器具含无线电模块（例如支持WiFi的智能冰箱），除EMC标准外还须适用国家电信监管局（NTRA）的型号核准。EMC合规通过EOS在合格评定中接受的检测报告予以证明；未通过发射或抗扰度限值的产品可能在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特的GOEIC进口检验中被拒。埃及电网为220 V单相、50 Hz，与中国频率相同。
summary.zht: 投放埃及市場的家用電冰箱須滿足源自EOS採用的、等效於IEC/CISPR 14（家用電器及電動工具的發射與抗擾度）的ES標準電磁相容要求。EOS（埃及標準化與質量組織）發布ES標準，對冰箱而言，其EMC通常採用IEC文本，並與ES IEC 60335安全標準並行適用。若器具含無線電模組（例如支援WiFi的智能冰箱），除EMC標準外還須適用國家電信監管局（NTRA）的型號核准。EMC合規通過EOS在合格評定中接受的檢測報告予以證明；未通過發射或抗擾度限值的產品可能在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特的GOEIC進口檢驗中被拒。埃及電網為220 V單相、50 Hz，與中國頻率相同。

standards_or_laws: ES standards adopting IEC/CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission
ES standards adopting IEC/CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity
NTRA type-approval — required where the refrigerator contains a radio/WiFi module (National Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Egypt)

summary.en: China's mandatory EMC requirement for household refrigerators is GB 4343.1 (electromagnetic compatibility — emission, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) together with GB 4343.2 / GB 17743 family for immunity, enforced within the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) scheme administered by CNCA/SAMR. CCC-marked refrigerators must pass GB 4343.1 emission testing at a CNAS-accredited laboratory. While both China (GB 4343 / GB 17625) and Egypt (ES adopting CISPR 14) trace to the same IEC/CISPR base text, the test reports and certificates are issued under different national schemes and are not automatically cross-recognised. China type-approval for radio modules is handled by SRRC, separate from Egypt's NTRA.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性EMC要求为GB 4343.1（电磁兼容——发射，等效于CISPR 14-1），并与GB 4343.2/GB 17743系列抗扰度标准配合，在由CNCA/SAMR管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC）制度内执行。标有CCC的冰箱须在CNAS认可实验室通过GB 4343.1发射检测。尽管中国（GB 4343/GB 17625）与埃及（采用CISPR 14的ES）均溯源于相同的IEC/CISPR基础文本，但检测报告与证书由不同国家制度签发，不会自动互认。中国无线电模块的型号核准由SRRC负责，与埃及NTRA分立。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性EMC要求為GB 4343.1（電磁相容——發射，等效於CISPR 14-1），並與GB 4343.2/GB 17743系列抗擾度標準配合，在由CNCA/SAMR管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC）制度內執行。標有CCC的冰箱須在CNAS認可實驗室通過GB 4343.1發射檢測。儘管中國（GB 4343/GB 17625）與埃及（採用CISPR 14的ES）均溯源於相同的IEC/CISPR基礎文本，但檢測報告與證書由不同國家制度簽發，不會自動互認。中國無線電模組的型號核准由SRRC負責，與埃及NTRA分立。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory, CCC scheme)
GB 17743 / GB 4343.2 — immunity and lighting-equipment EMC requirements (CCC supporting standards)
SRRC type-approval — China radio module approval (separate from Egypt NTRA)

gap.en: Although both schemes derive from CISPR 14, a Chinese exporter cannot rely on existing CCC EMC test data for Egyptian market access: (1) EOS conformity assessment requires test reports against the ES-adopted EMC standard, and Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC reports are not automatically accepted — re-testing or a report from an EOS-recognised body is typically needed; (2) for smart/WiFi refrigerators, a separate NTRA type-approval is required and the Chinese SRRC approval does not transfer; (3) EMC documentation must accompany the GOEIC registration and import-inspection file, so missing or mismatched EMC evidence can stop the shipment at the port. Exporters should confirm with EOS / their conformity-assessment body which EMC report format and which accredited laboratory are accepted for Egypt.
gap.zh: 尽管两套制度均源自CISPR 14，中国出口商不能依赖现有CCC EMC检测数据进入埃及市场：（1）EOS合格评定要求提供针对ES采用的EMC标准的检测报告，中国GB 4343.1 CCC报告不会被自动接受——通常须重新检测或取得EOS认可机构出具的报告；（2）对于智能/WiFi冰箱，须单独取得NTRA型号核准，中国SRRC核准不可转移；（3）EMC文件须随GOEIC注册及进口检验档案一并提交，因此EMC证据缺失或不匹配可能使货物在口岸被拦。出口商应向EOS或其合格评定机构确认埃及接受的EMC报告格式及认可实验室。
gap.zht: 儘管兩套制度均源自CISPR 14，中國出口商不能依賴現有CCC EMC檢測數據進入埃及市場：（1）EOS合格評定要求提供針對ES採用的EMC標準的檢測報告，中國GB 4343.1 CCC報告不會被自動接受——通常須重新檢測或取得EOS認可機構出具的報告；（2）對於智能/WiFi冰箱，須單獨取得NTRA型號核准，中國SRRC核准不可轉移；（3）EMC文件須隨GOEIC註冊及進口檢驗檔案一併提交，因此EMC證據缺失或不匹配可能使貨物在口岸被攔。出口商應向EOS或其合格評定機構確認埃及接受的EMC報告格式及認可實驗室。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformity to ES standards adopting CISPR 14 is required as part of EOS conformity assessment and GOEIC import inspection; NTRA type-approval additionally mandatory for radio/WiFi-equipped models
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4343.1 emission compliance required within the CCC scheme before sale in China; administered by CNCA/SAMR

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to ES standards adopting CISPR 14 is part of Egypt's mandatory conformity assessment for refrigerators. Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data does not automatically substitute — an EOS-accepted EMC report is required, and WiFi-enabled models need separate NTRA type-approval. Confirm the accepted report format and laboratory with EOS before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 采用CISPR 14的ES标准EMC合规是埃及对冰箱强制性合格评定的组成部分。中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据不能自动替代——须取得EOS接受的EMC报告，且支持WiFi的型号需单独的NTRA型号核准。出货前应向EOS确认接受的报告格式及实验室。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 採用CISPR 14的ES標準EMC合規是埃及對冰箱強制性合格評定的組成部分。中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據不能自動替代——須取得EOS接受的EMC報告，且支援WiFi的型號需單獨的NTRA型號核准。出貨前應向EOS確認接受的報告格式及實驗室。
